title: Wish Attack 5
description: The Wish Attack 5 modpack contains all mods approved for this year's season.
body:
This modpack contains all mods that have been approved for this year's season of the project. This modpack contains only clientside mods that are both recommended and mandatory by the team. It was developed to increase the performance of Minecraft and improve the gameplay through mods such as Simple Voice Chat.

<details>
<summary>Mod list</summary>

### API
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

### Optimization
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
- [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium)
- [LazyDFU](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazydfu)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)

### Other Mods
- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options)
- [Replay Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/replaymod)
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)
- [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered)
- [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)
- [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)

  
</details>
